description: Create a new Account Review in Eramba for the quarterly access review cycle. The record must be named 'Q1 2025 Core Banking Access Review' with the description: 'Quarterly review of all user access privileges for the Core Banking Platform as required by SOX Section 404 internal controls over financial reporting. Scope includes all Active Directory service accounts, application-level roles, and privileged database access. Review must be completed by March 31, 2025.' Set the review/deadline date to '2025-03-31' and the owner/reviewer to 'admin'.
